title: Question: Multiple comma-separated declaration in one for-loop

features.name: multiple_comma_separated_declarations_in_for_loop_init
features.description: Code should include a for-loop with multiple comma-separated variable declarations in the initialization section
features.snippet: for (int count = 0, done = 0, j = 0; j * count < 125; j++, count++) $display("Value j = %d\n", j);
